answers.description: A macOS menu bar app that helps you stay aware of your active session time and keeps the computer awake if needed
answers.problem: It's easy to lose track of how long you've been working, leading to poor time awareness and burnout. Prevent Mac sleeping for long running jobs and presentations
answers.target_users: Anyone who needs to track active work sessions and prevent Mac sleep
answers.goals: Simple unobtrusive time awareness; reliable keep-awake; nice extras like emoji customization and history
